channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CNN Reporter's Story About Karoline Leavitt Blows Up That Whole 'Fascist Trump Admin' Narrative
Here We Go Again: Senate Dems Torpedo DHS Funding Bill, High Tail It Out of D.C. As Shutdown Looms
Federal judge blocks Trump's bid to move Biden-commuted death row inmates to ‘Alcatraz of the Rockies’
item.description: A judge who blocked the Trump administration from transferring former death row inmates said the criminals were convicted of "some of the most horrifi...

item.title: Trump Lauds Bondi's Performance at Circus-Like Capitol Hill Hearing, Has Strong Words for Massie
Federal judge blocks Pentagon from demoting Mark Kelly over controversial military video
item.description: A federal judge blocked the Pentagon from punishing Sen. Mark Kelly, D-Ariz., over a controversial video, ruling his First Amendment rights were viola...

item.title: 'Horsefeathers!': Judge Steps in, Freezing Pentagon Move Against Sen. Kelly Over Military Speech
Poll: 58 Percent Say Democrats Too Radical As 'Very Liberal' Wing Quadruples Since 1999
US lawmakers warn Taiwan to ‘meet the moment’ as China stages invasion-style drills
item.description: Bipartisan U.S. lawmakers warn Taiwan's political gridlock over defense spending could undermine deterrence as China escalates military pressure.

item.title: Leavitt unloads on Obama over voter ID push, accuses Dems of 'panic'
item.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt criticizes former President Barack Obama for opposing voter ID laws after House passes SAVE Act.

item.title: Federal judge upholds temporary protected status for Haitian immigrants
item.description: A federal judge upheld temporary protected status for Haitian immigrants in the United States and quoted death threats she's received, during a Thursd...
